conservative.name: Final Strike
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon equipped, engaged with target. The target must be critically wounded

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage and this card recharges immediately
You hit the target for normal damage, plus additional damage equal to the total severity of critical wounds the target is suffering from including any gained from this action

bane.description: Suffer 1 fatigue per critical wound you are suffering from

sigmarsComet.description: Turn one of the target's wounds faceup before resolving this attack

reckless.name: Final Strike
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon equipped, engaged with target. You must be critically wounded

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage and this card recharges immediately
You hit the target for normal damage, plus additional damage equal tot he total severity of critical wounds you are suffering from

sigmarsComet.description: Before resolving this attack, turn one of your wounds faceup. After resolving this attack, turn one of your non-Severe Injury critical wounds facedown
